title: Report an environmental issue by your employer
body: "You can use this form to report environmental issues caused by your employer to the Environment Agency.   To report an environmental incident that is happening now, call 0800 80 70 60.   There’s a different process to report:   a concern about a health and safety issue in the workplace an incident that is impacting the environment now and which may need the Environment Agency to attend environmental health concerns to your local council – find your local council    Before you start  If you want to include a location with your report, you can add the address or the exact location using what3words.  Start now   Find out more about reporting serious wrongdoing to the Environment Agency.  Privacy notice  Read how the Environment Agency use your personal information when you report an environmental issue by your employer. "
